g.text: NET CONFIDENCE LEDGER (authoritative list - every net + basis)

g.desc: NET CONFIDENCE LEDGER (authoritative list - every net + basis)

g.desc: I2C0_SCL spec bus map: I2C0 SCL, 1.8V (IMU 0x1E, codec 0x0A, gauge 0x16, FPGA TBD)

g.desc: I2C0_SDA spec bus map: I2C0 SDA, 1.8V

g.desc: I2C2_SCL spec bus map: I2C2 SCL, 1.8V (touch 0x64, GPIO 0x40)

g.text: I2C2_SDA spec bus map: I2C2 SDA, 1.8V

g.desc: I2C2_SDA spec bus map: I2C2 SDA, 1.8V

g.desc: SPI1_SCK spec bus map: SPI1 clock, 1.8V

g.desc: SPI1_MOSI spec bus map: SPI1 MOSI, 1.8V

g.desc: SPI1_MISO spec bus map: SPI1 MISO, 1.8V

g.text: SPI1_CS0_DISP spec: SPI1 PCS0 = display (through FPGA)

g.desc: SPI1_CS0_DISP spec: SPI1 PCS0 = display (through FPGA)

g.text: SPI1_CS2_FPGA spec: SPI1 PCS2 = FPGA registers

g.desc: SPI1_CS2_FPGA spec: SPI1 PCS2 = FPGA registers

g.text: I2S0_TXD spec: I2S0 CPU->FPGA/codec data (CPU is I2S master)

g.desc: I2S0_TXD spec: I2S0 CPU->FPGA/codec data (CPU is I2S master)

g.text: I2S0_LRCLK spec: I2S0 L/R clock (8 kHz); FPGA mic clock locks to this x64

g.desc: I2S0_LRCLK spec: I2S0 L/R clock (8 kHz); FPGA mic clock locks to this x64

g.text: XTAL_16M spec clock topology: 16 MHz crystal -> CPU EXTAL0/XTAL0

g.desc: XTAL_16M spec clock topology: 16 MHz crystal -> CPU EXTAL0/XTAL0

g.text: XTAL_32K spec: 32.768 kHz osc -> CPU RTC + audio subsection

g.desc: XTAL_32K spec: 32.768 kHz osc -> CPU RTC + audio subsection

g.text: CLK60M_FPGA spec: CPU MCGOUTCLK 120M / OUTDIV4 = 60 MHz -> FPGA PLL (sysclk 64 MHz)

g.desc: CLK60M_FPGA spec: CPU MCGOUTCLK 120M / OUTDIV4 = 60 MHz -> FPGA PLL (sysclk 64 MHz)

g.text: MIC_PDM_CLK spec: FPGA-generated mic master clock (<=2.4 MHz), PLL-locked to I2S L/R x64

g.desc: MIC_PDM_CLK spec: FPGA-generated mic master clock (<=2.4 MHz), PLL-locked to I2S L/R x64

g.text: DISP_SCK spec: display SPI clock via FPGA

g.desc: DISP_SCK spec: display SPI clock via FPGA

g.text: DISP_MOSI spec: display SPI data via FPGA

g.desc: DISP_MOSI spec: display SPI data via FPGA

g.text: CHARGE_n spec: CHARGE input CPU PTA24 (ball K11) low = charging; charge LED direct from charger

g.desc: CHARGE_n spec: CHARGE input CPU PTA24 (ball K11) low = charging; charge LED direct from charger

g.text: IRQ_LLWU_P8 spec: touch/GPIO INT -> CPU LLWU_P8 (PTC4, spec 'pin B8') low-power wakeup

g.desc: IRQ_LLWU_P8 spec: touch/GPIO INT -> CPU LLWU_P8 (PTC4, spec 'pin B8') low-power wakeup

g.text: BLE_RESET_n spec register map reg1 bit4 BLE_RESET_N: FPGA controls BC127 reset

g.desc: BLE_RESET_n spec register map reg1 bit4 BLE_RESET_N: FPGA controls BC127 reset

g.text: BLE_VREG_EN spec register map reg1 bit5 BLE_VREG_EN: FPGA controls BC127 regulator

g.desc: BLE_VREG_EN spec register map reg1 bit5 BLE_VREG_EN: FPGA controls BC127 regulator

g.text: TOUCH_ELEC spec: 3 touch buttons (TZ0-2) + right-edge slider (wheel2) electrodes

g.desc: TOUCH_ELEC spec: 3 touch buttons (TZ0-2) + right-edge slider (wheel2) electrodes

g.text: UI_LED spec: 6-7 UI LEDs via touch ctlr (Premium) or GPIO expander (Economy)

g.desc: UI_LED spec: 6-7 UI LEDs via touch ctlr (Premium) or GPIO expander (Economy)

g.text: BTN spec: 4 push buttons SW1-4 via GPIO expander (Economy variant)

g.desc: BTN spec: 4 push buttons SW1-4 via GPIO expander (Economy variant)

g.text: COIL spec: Rx coil -> BQ51050B AC1/AC2 (Qi, Premium)

g.desc: COIL spec: Rx coil -> BQ51050B AC1/AC2 (Qi, Premium)

g.text: +VBAT spec: Li-Po ~4.2 V -> PMIC input; charger output

g.desc: +VBAT spec: Li-Po ~4.2 V -> PMIC input; charger output

g.text: +1V8 spec power table: 1.8 V rail (CPU core/dig, SDRAM, flash, mics, codec-dig, touch, 1.8V IO)

g.desc: +1V8 spec power table: 1.8 V rail (CPU core/dig, SDRAM, flash, mics, codec-dig, touch, 1.8V IO)

g.text: +3V3 spec power table: 3.3 V rail (codec analog, IMU, FPGA core/VCCA, BC127, display)

g.desc: +3V3 spec power table: 3.3 V rail (codec analog, IMU, FPGA core/VCCA, BC127, display)

g.text: GND common ground / shield can / battery negative

g.desc: GND common ground / shield can / battery negative

g.text: GREEN = verified by continuity (none yet - pre-teardown)

g.desc: GREEN = verified by continuity (none yet - pre-teardown)

g.text: BLUE = vendor design spec (block diagram / bus map / power table)

g.desc: BLUE = vendor design spec (block diagram / bus map / power table)

g.text: This sheet is EVIDENCE, not a design. A net that looks certain but

g.desc: This sheet is EVIDENCE, not a design. A net that looks certain but

g.text: is only inferred is worse than an honest hole. Re-open in eeschema

g.desc: is only inferred is worse than an honest hole. Re-open in eeschema

g.text: and recolour a net GREEN only after buzzing it out on the bench.

g.desc: and recolour a net GREEN only after buzzing it out on the bench.

g.text: Reconstructed from the owner-held design spec; NOT verified against the metal. Every net colour = confidence. No net is green: nothing is continuity-verified yet.

g.desc: Reconstructed from the owner-held design spec; NOT verified against the metal. Every net colour = confidence. No net is green: nothing is continuity-verified yet.
